statuses.attendee_statuses_description: Statuses track where an attendee is in your workflow. The public default is the status new public bookings start in; if it is a reservation, bookings pay a deposit now and the balance later. When a balance is paid the attendee moves to the paid status.
statuses.form_reservation_checkbox: This is a reservation — collect a deposit now, balance later
statuses.form_public_default_checkbox: Default status for new public bookings
statuses.form_paid_default_checkbox: Status an attendee moves to when their balance is paid
statuses.delete_confirm: Type the status name "{name}" to confirm deletion:
